goal: Split Web Agents into an independently installable normal plugin product, an extension-independent roundtable product, and a UI-free local security core.
non_goals: Do not require either extension for the default roundtable CDP runtime.
Do not mix roundtable UI or state into the normal plugin.
Do not inspect credentials, cookies, tokens, account identity, or private conversations.
Do not delete the codex/new-plugin-rewrite branch or its remote ref.
acceptance_criteria: Normal plugin source and build contain no roundtable product code.
Roundtable default tests do not load either extension.
Local core contains no UI, HTTP server, browser API, fixed product port, or product state.
Plugin owns only filesystem and gateway services; roundtable owns only workbench, Chrome CDP, and Playwright MCP.
Both products start, stop, test, build, and persist data independently.
Static product boundaries and concurrent runtime isolation are enforced by tests.
live_acceptance_constraint: Real DeepSeek and Doubao acceptance requires user-owned logged-in tabs and manual handling of verification; it was not executed automatically.
